capture.cameraPose: Desktop browser viewport after adding right-hand stable-pinch trace-select evidence; the Input Evidence panel now includes Trace hand select status.
capture.captureCommand: Chrome DevTools MCP performance_start_trace with reload for console reset, then take_screenshot for the selected localhost page.

notes: The ED station remains a placeholder clinical bay; this slice improves hand-select evidence, not environmental realism or clinical equipment density.
Primitive capsule actors and box-style hand models remain known realism gaps; no asset, clothing, skin, rigging, or medical equipment fidelity claim is made.
The Input Evidence spatial panel now exposes a visible Trace hand select row with status, dwell, and blocker text in the desktop capture.
The screenshot proves the hand-select status affordance is rendered in desktop preview only; it does not prove Quest hand-pinch firing, latency, locomotion comfort, or copy/export behavior.
The hand-select row remains readable in the Input Evidence panel without new overlap against the dialogue panel, clock, or actor placeholders from this camera pose.

This is desktop Chrome DevTools visual iteration evidence only; it is not physical Quest proof, not immersive WebXR proof, not in-headset readability proof, not hand-tracking quality proof, and not production runtime readiness.
